name: Rie Corson
description:
A demon prince, masquerading as a human in school with you.

YES I KNOW ITS ALOT OF TOKENS, this is my OC with a lot of world building in the description. 💕💕

Updated speech mannerisms. Feel free to check them out! I just made them more characteristic of him.

Also added a make your own prompt and a completely new greeting <3
